name: Conicelli Autoplex
description_short: Conicelli Toyota of Conshohocken is a full-service Toyota dealership in PA that arranges auto financing through major lenders for new, used, and certified pre-owned vehicles.
description_long:
Conicelli Toyota of Conshohocken is a franchised Toyota dealership located at 550 Ridge Pike in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania (ZIP 19428). The dealership is part of the broader Conicelli Autoplex group and has operated in the Greater Philadelphia area for many years, serving buyers across southeastern Pennsylvania. Their primary business is the sale of new and pre-owned Toyota vehicles, supported by an in-house finance center that connects buyers with third-party lenders.

The dealership's Finance Center arranges vehicle financing through a curated list of preferred lenders including Toyota Financial Services (TFS), PNC, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, Chase, Ally Bank, and Citadel. They offer lease and purchase APR programs on new Toyotas, with lease rates starting as low as $207/month and APRs as low as 2.99% on select models (offers valid through 03/31/2026). For certified pre-owned vehicles, special APRs of 4.75% are available for up to 72 months on qualifying Gold Certified models. They also operate a 'Conicelli Auto Credit' program and a 'Re-establish Your Credit' pathway, specifically targeting buyers with damaged or limited credit histories who need auto financing.

Several features distinguish Conicelli from a generic dealership finance operation. They offer a $750 Military Rebate for qualified U.S. military personnel, a College Grad Rebate program, and a Loyalty Program for returning customers. All new Toyotas come with ToyotaCare, a no-cost maintenance plan covering two years or 25,000 miles plus 24-hour roadside assistance. Pre-owned vehicles carry a 60-Day Used Car Warranty. The dealership also offers Toyota Certified Used vehicles with manufacturer-backed inspections and special financing rates.

This is an auto dealership first and a financing source second. Consumers who come here for financing must be purchasing a vehicle — there are no standalone personal loans, debt consolidation products, or cash-out options. The best advertised APRs require Tier 1+ credit as determined by Toyota Financial Services, meaning subprime buyers will face higher rates or may need to use the Conicelli Auto Credit program, which likely carries less favorable terms. A $490 documentation fee applies to all transactions, and all lease/finance offers are subject to change without notice.
pros: Access to seven preferred lenders (TFS, PNC, BofA, Wells Fargo, Chase, Ally, Citadel) providing competitive rate shopping in one visit
Dedicated 'Conicelli Auto Credit' program for buyers with challenged or thin credit histories
APRs as low as 2.99% and lease payments starting at $207/month on select new Toyota models
$750 Military Rebate for qualified active duty, reserves, veterans, and eligible family members
College Graduate Rebate program for recent and soon-to-be graduates
ToyotaCare included on all new vehicles — 2 years/25,000 miles of free scheduled maintenance plus roadside assistance
Toyota Certified Used vehicles available with 4.75% APR financing for up to 72 months and a 60-day used car warranty
cons: Financing is exclusively tied to vehicle purchase — no personal loans, debt consolidation, or cash advances available
Best advertised rates (Tier 1+) require excellent credit as determined by Toyota Financial Services; subprime buyers will receive higher APRs
All transactions carry a $490 documentation fee on top of tax, tags, and title
Finance offers expire frequently and are subject to change without notice, making rate comparisons difficult over time
Out-of-state buyers face additional restrictions and must contact the dealership separately for offer eligibility
best_for: Credit-challenged buyers specifically seeking an auto loan as a credit-rebuilding vehicle
Toyota brand loyalists who want manufacturer-backed financing rates through TFS
Active duty military or veterans eligible for the $750 rebate on a new or certified Toyota
Recent college graduates seeking entry-level auto financing with manufacturer incentive support
diagnosis: Conicelli Toyota of Conshohocken is an auto dealership, not a consumer finance company — any financing obtained here is contingent on purchasing a vehicle from their inventory. It is best suited for buyers who need auto financing alongside a Toyota purchase, particularly those using the Conicelli Auto Credit program to rebuild credit through a car loan. Consumers seeking personal loans, emergency cash, or debt relief should look elsewhere, as this lender offers nothing outside of vehicle-secured financing.
services: Toyota Gold Certified Used vehicle sales
Auto loan origination through preferred lender network (TFS, PNC, BofA, Wells Fargo, Chase, Ally, Citadel)
Conicelli Auto Credit (credit-challenged / credit-rebuilding auto loans)
Online finance application and quick credit app
Vehicle protection plans and service contracts
